rrStandingsRules.summary: Football system. Win = 3, tie = 1, loss = 0. Ranking: Football system, Match win, Pts scored, Pts difference.

standingsRules.summary: Kitakana system. Win by >5 = 3, win by 5 = 2, win by <5 = 1.5, tie = 1, lose by <5 = 0.5, other loss = 0. Close wins/losses count as MT in the table. Ranking: Kitakana system, Match win, Pts difference, Pts scored.

Kitakana system. Win by >5 = 3, win by 5 = 2, win by <5 = 1.5, tie = 1, lose by <5 = 0.5, other loss = 0. Close wins/losses count as MT in the table. Ranking: Kitakana system, Match win, Pts difference, Pts scored.
